name: flowgen-lead-saas
description: Complete multi-tenant SaaS platform for lead generation and automated outreach

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.type-check:all: npm run type-check:frontend && npm run type-check:backend
